requirements.quote: Use a sandbox account from the HighLevel Marketplace.
requirements.acceptance: README documents sandbox creation + PIT generation steps.

requirements.quote: Integrate via custom JS or a GHL marketplace app that allows code to reside within the customer account.
requirements.acceptance: App embeds as a Custom Page iframe; CSP frame-ancestors allows GHL; useGhlBridge handshake + signed-context decode exist.

requirements.quote: Ingest and analyze existing Voice AI agent call transcripts.
requirements.acceptance: Webhook + PIT sync ingest calls/transcripts; analyze route produces an Analysis. Seeded transcripts demonstrate content.

requirements.quote: Set observability parameters based on the agent's specific goals or script.
requirements.acceptance: Agent has successCriteria; criteria.ts derives them from goal/script when absent.

requirements.quote: Identify deviations, failures, or missed opportunities against success criteria (KPIs).
requirements.acceptance: Analysis.findings include type deviation|failure|missed_opportunity tied to criteria with severity + evidence turns.

requirements.quote: Build an intuitive dashboard that visualizes performance issues across agents.
requirements.acceptance: Fleet dashboard with KPI cards, trend chart, agent table; per-agent + per-call drill-down. shadcn-vue, beautiful.

requirements.quote: Provide immediate recommendations for prompt/script/agent adjustments based on identified failures.
requirements.acceptance: Analysis.recommendations target prompt|script|agent_config|training with paste-ready suggestedChange, shown in UI.

requirements.quote: Highlight 'Use Actions' (specific segments of a call that require human intervention or script training).
requirements.acceptance: Analysis.useActions flag turnRange + recommendedAction; UI highlights those transcript segments.

requirements.quote: Github repo URL for the widget/marketplace app and backend logic (Node.js backend, Vue.js frontend).
requirements.acceptance: Single Nuxt repo: Nitro backend + Vue frontend. Committed.

requirements.quote: Documented steps to install and run the observability suite inside a HighLevel sandbox.
Demo (2-5 min): ingesting+monitoring, unified dashboard, AI recommendations for a specific agent.
requirements.acceptance: Demo script in README; flows runnable locally.

requirements.quote: README describing architecture and how you handled 'Team of One' ownership (Product, Design, Engineering & QA).
Notes on what is functional (real-time transcript ingestion) vs what is mocked.
Product Thinking + UI/UX: customer-centric, intuitive, seamlessly integrated into HighLevel.
requirements.acceptance: GHL-native chrome, intuitive flows, embeds in iframe.

requirements.quote: Completeness: closes the loop from raw logs to actionable recommendations.
requirements.acceptance: End-to-end: transcript -> analysis -> recommendation -> UI, verified by smoke test.

requirements.quote: Technical Integrity: clarity of observability architecture and recommendations logic.
requirements.acceptance: Pluggable LLM, zod-validated structured output, clear service layering.

requirements.quote: Manual Code Review: only non-slop code.
requirements.acceptance: No dead stubs, no lorem, types used, per-slice review passed.
